code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{downloadMarkdown,downloadHTML}from'../../utils/exportUtils';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ExportButton=_ref=>{let{note,disabled=false}=_ref;const[isOpen,setIsOpen]=useState(false);const handleExportMarkdown=()=>{if(note){downloadMarkdown(note);}};const handleExportHTML=()=>{if(note){downloadHTML(note);}setIsOpen(false);};if(!note){return null;}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"export-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"export-btn",onClick:()=>setIsOpen(!isOpen),disabled:disabled,title:"Export note",children:"\uD83D\uDCC4 Export"}),isOpen&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"export-dropdown",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"export-option",onClick:handleExportMarkdown,title:"Export as Markdown",children:"\uD83D\uDCDD Markdown (.md)"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"export-option",onClick:handleExportHTML,title:"Export as HTML",children:"\uD83C\uDF10 HTML (.html)"})]})]});};export default ExportButton;
